description: Kubernetes environments now support Ingress (networking.k8s.io/v1) and Gateway API (gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1) resources with fluent WithRoute(), WithTls(), WithHostname(), and class configuration. Gateway TLS now supports FQDN auto-discovery: when WithTls() is used without WithHostname(), Aspire polls for the controller-assigned address and patches it in automatically. Extension methods have moved to the Aspire.Hosting namespace (source-breaking for early adopters who had explicit using Aspire.Hosting.Kubernetes directives).
name: Kubernetes Ingress and Gateway API routing resources
